title: Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal
tagline: Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal — spiritual town of Uttarakhand

overview.short: The hill temple of Kalinka is situated in Bironkhal block of Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand in northern India.
overview.description: The hill temple of Kalinka is situated in Bironkhal block of Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand in northern India. The temple complex lies close to the border with the Almora district and is dedicated to Goddess Kali. The temple has been in existence for centuries but the new structure has been renovated a couple of times in the last decade. It is often confused with Bunkhal kalinka, which is near Malund village of Raath region in Thalisain.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Bironkhal
topPlaces.description: Bironkhal Tehsil is a administrative division located in the Pauri Garhwal district of the Indian state of Uttarakhand. It is one of the 14 tehsils in the district and is headquartered in the town of Syunsi.

topPlaces.name: Saraikhet
topPlaces.description: Saraikhet (spelling variants: Suraikhet and Sarai Khet) is a village in Almora district, Uttarakhand, India. It has a population of 305 (as of 2011).

topPlaces.name: Gujrugarhi
topPlaces.description: Gujrugarhi is a place of historical importance located in Patti Gujdu of Nainidanda region in Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India. The whole complex of temple and historical caves is situated on a hilltop in Deeba range at an average altitude of 2400 metres (7880 ft).

topPlaces.name: Gadkhark Malla
topPlaces.description: Gadkhark is a village in the Thalisain tehsil of Bironkhal block in Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India. The village was established by erstwhile kings of the Panwar dynasty of Garhwal.

topPlaces.name: Diba Danda
topPlaces.description: Deeba Danda is a peak in the Patti Khatli region of Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India. It is 2,670 metres (8,760 ft) high and is a part of the Diba Range, which forms the southern boundary of the Nayar Valley.

topPlaces.name: Chopta
topPlaces.description: Chopta is a small region of meadows and evergreen forest area, a part of Kedarnath wildlife sanctuary located in Uttarakhand state, India and a base for trekking to Tungnath, the third temple of Panch Kedar which lies 3.5 kilometres (2.2 mi) away. Located at a distance of 1.5 kilometres (0.93 mi) from Tungnath is Chandrashila, a summit rising to over 4,000 metres (13,000 ft).

items.note: Bironkhal Tehsil is a administrative division located in the Pauri Garhwal district of the Indian state of Uttarakhand. It is one of the 14 tehsils in the district and is headquartered in the town of Syunsi.
Saraikhet (spelling variants: Suraikhet and Sarai Khet) is a village in Almora district, Uttarakhand, India. It has a population of 305 (as of 2011).

Gujrugarhi is a place of historical importance located in Patti Gujdu of Nainidanda region in Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India. The whole complex of temple and historical caves is situated on a hilltop in Deeba range at an average altitude of 2400 metres (7880 ft).
Gadkhark is a village in the Thalisain tehsil of Bironkhal block in Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India. The village was established by erstwhile kings of the Panwar dynasty of Garhwal.

Deeba Danda is a peak in the Patti Khatli region of Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India. It is 2,670 metres (8,760 ft) high and is a part of the Diba Range, which forms the southern boundary of the Nayar Valley.

Chopta is a small region of meadows and evergreen forest area, a part of Kedarnath wildlife sanctuary located in Uttarakhand state, India and a base for trekking to Tungnath, the third temple of Panch Kedar which lies 3.5 kilometres (2.2 mi) away. Located at a distance of 1.5 kilometres (0.93 mi) from Tungnath is Chandrashila, a summit rising to over 4,000 metres (13,000 ft).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dehradun Airport (Jolly Grant) (93 km) and the nearest railway station is Kathgodam (Nainital railhead) (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal?
faq.a: Stays in Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalinka, Pauri Garhwal?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bironkhal, Saraikhet, Gujrugarhi, Gadkhark Malla, Diba Danda.
